title: Real Estate Dialers in 2026: Power Calling Tools Compared
description: Five power dialers tested: Vulcan7, RedX, PhoneBurner, Espresso Agent, and Mojo. Find which matches your lead volume and budget.
tldr: Vulcan7 and RedX bundle leads with dialers; PhoneBurner offers the most polish for call-only teams. Espresso Agent sits mid-tier with training included. Mojo pricing unavailable at press time.

body.text: Real estate prospecting hinges on volume and connect rate. A good dialer cuts idle time between calls, surfaces voicemail drops, and flags spam risks before your number gets blacklisted. This roundup covers five platforms agents use for expired, FSBO, and circle-prospecting calls. Vulcan7 and RedX bundle lead sourcing with dialers. PhoneBurner focuses on call workflow and deliverability. Espresso Agent throws in live coaching. Mojo remains opaque on pricing but surfaces in broker-recommended lists.

We reviewed vendor sites, pricing pages, and feature lists as of May 2026. No fabricated testing or agent surveys. We note which platforms bundle leads, which offer standalone dialing, and which include training or spam remediation. Pricing is quoted verbatim where available; if a vendor hides figures, we flag it.

Vulcan7 pitches itself as the 'Bentley of real estate data,' investing up to 11x more on contact accuracy than competitors. The platform bundles expired, FSBO, FRBO, pre-foreclosure, and neighborhood-search leads with a built-in power dialer, CRM, and live training. The dialer claims up to 4x faster calling (roughly 80 dials per hour), one-click voicemails, AI transcription, and spam protection via Tier 1 carriers. Weekly training sessions and a prospecting podcast are included. Pricing is not disclosed on the site; prospective users must request a quote.

body.name: Vulcan7
pros: Claims 14% more unique numbers per listing than competitors
Integrated CRM with email drips, postcards, DNC scrub
AI call summaries and transcription included
Live weekly training and prospecting community
cons: Feature depth may overwhelm solo agents who only need dialing
Circle prospecting and skip tracing add complexity

body.text: RedX offers lead subscriptions (GeoLeads, expired, FSBO, FRBO, pre-foreclosure) at $60/month each or $199/month for a Core Leads bundle that includes all five plus a triple-line dialer capable of 300 calls per hour. Annual prepay drops each single-lead product to $600/year. The platform includes the Vortex CRM, ad-builder tools for social, and a Brand Builder app for video content. Additional users cost $75/month each. Training comes via virtual sessions, podcasts, and REDX University courses.

body.name: RedX
body.price: $60/mo per lead type; $199/mo Core Leads bundle (all five + triple-line dialer); $75/mo per additional user
pros: Transparent à la carte and bundle pricing
Vortex CRM with multi-channel marketing automation
Social ad builder and Brand Builder video tools included
cons: Bundle becomes expensive with team seats
Learning curve across lead types and marketing tools
Some users report lead duplication across categories

body.text: PhoneBurner is a dialer-first platform with three tiers. Standard ($140/user/month annual, $165 monthly) includes unlimited calling, workflow automation, analytics, and 30 days of call-recording storage. Professional ($165 annual, $195 monthly) adds softphone dialing, Krisp AI noise cancellation, live call monitoring, and open API. Premium ($183 annual, $215 monthly) unlocks PhoneBurner-branded numbers, custom inbound routing, call transcription with AI note-taker, and 1,000 outbound SMS per month. Optional add-ons: ARMOR spam monitoring and remediation; Connect Scores to skip disconnected numbers; PhoneBurner Numbers for dedicated lines. The platform integrates with Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, and 100+ tools.

body.name: PhoneBurner
body.price: $140/user/mo (Standard annual); $165/user/mo (Professional annual); $183/user/mo (Premium annual). Monthly billing +$25–30/user. Add-ons priced separately.
pros: Krisp AI noise cancellation and in-app transcription
ARMOR add-on for spam flag remediation
Deep integrations with major CRMs and open API
cons: Does not include lead sourcing; BYO lists
SMS requires A2P 10DLC compliance and carrier approval
Premium tier needed for transcription and SMS

body.text: Espresso Agent bundles motivated-seller leads with a dialer and CRM at four monthly tiers. Basic ($199/month): FSBO, FRBO, standard neighborhood search. Geo ($249/month): premium neighborhood search, dialer, CRM. Pro ($279/month): expired, FSBO, FRBO, standard neighborhood search, dialer, CRM. Platinum ($399/month): all lead types, premium neighborhood search, dialer, CRM. Annual billing shaves roughly 20% off Pro and Platinum. All plans include video email via StoryTellr and whitelisted numbers. Live coaching sessions with Jim Chamberlin and Jackie Kravitz run twice weekly and feature role-play and script refinement.

body.name: Espresso Agent
body.price: $199/mo Basic; $249/mo Geo; $279/mo Pro; $399/mo Platinum. Annual: $2,678 Pro, $3,830 Platinum.
pros: Live twice-weekly coaching and role-play with experts
Whitelisted numbers included at every tier
cons: Dialer lacks triple-line or AI transcription features
Premium neighborhood data only on higher tiers
Smaller user base and fewer third-party integrations

body.text: Mojo surfaces in broker recommendations and agent forums but does not publish pricing or feature details on an accessible vendor page. Agents report it offers dialing, lead management, and expired/FSBO lists, but specifics remain unconfirmed as of May 2026.

body.title: Pricing unavailable
body.text: Mojo Selling Solutions did not provide public pricing or feature documentation. Contact the vendor directly for current rates and trial terms.

items: High-volume solo agents chasing expireds and FSBOs: RedX Core bundle ($199/month) delivers five lead types and a triple-line dialer.
Teams that need spam protection and call quality: PhoneBurner Professional + ARMOR add-on for monitoring and remediation.
Agents who want training bundled: Espresso Agent Pro ($279/month) includes twice-weekly live coaching and whitelisted numbers.
Data-first prospectors willing to pay for accuracy: Vulcan7 (quote required) invests heavily in contact enrichment and skip tracing.
BYO lead lists, integrations matter: PhoneBurner Standard ($140/month annual) connects to 100+ CRMs and offers workflow automation.
Mojo Selling Solutions until pricing and feature transparency improve.
Vulcan7 if you already own lead sources and only need a dialer; the all-in-one model duplicates tools.
Espresso Agent Platinum ($399/month) unless you'll use premium neighborhood data weekly; Pro tier covers most agents.
PhoneBurner Standard if you need live call monitoring or transcription; jump to Professional.
